_meta.note: 20th major-arc enrichment dip; 2nd of the A-roundup campaign (Matt S154). The Dorne spine was built S117 (the Queenmaker plot) with 0 enrichment dips. Baseline = 196 internal edges but only 9 internal CAUSAL edges (thin spine + under-wired conspirator web). WIRE+ENRICH; the dedup killed the dense dyadic web. 3 new nodes (garin-of-the-orphans [character.human, fixes the wrong-target bug], hotahs-longaxe [object.artifact], spear-tower [place.location] — NO container tag, Dorne not an approved container). 38 edges. MARQUEE value: (a) the Arys-Oakheart soiled-knight sub-arc (arianne MANIPULATES arys via_seduction + DECEIVES via false marriage promise + arys BREAKS_VOW + ATTACKS [the suicide charge]); (b) the conspirator web (Garin/Drey/Sylva AGENT_IN+CONSPIRES_WITH, the dispersal Norvos/Tyrosh/Greenstone); (c) the WHODUNIT done HONESTLY — NO informer SUSPECTED_OF minted (the text leaves 'someone always tells' deliberately unproven), the whodunit value is the structural irony doran MANIPULATES arianne via_false_information [the false-suitor ploy concealing the pact CAUSED the plot] + the cover-story DECEIVES balon-swann [Darkstar-killed-Arys] + gerold OPPOSES the plot [the saboteur-within who maimed Myrcella to spark the war the plot avoided]; (d) cross-arc seams: murder-of-elia MOTIVATES doran [Sack-of-KL->Dorne, parallels the existing ...MOTIVATES oberyn], myrcella CLAIMS iron-throne [FIRST CLAIMS iron-throne edge in graph; the Dornish-primogeniture premise], the Sand-Snake forward-dispatch to KL/High-Hermitage; (e) descriptive de-islanding: hotahs-longaxe artifact lit, water-gardens wired (was 0 edges to core), ghaston-grey/sea-of-dorne/spear-tower lit. THEORY-GATED (node-prose, NO edges): Aegon-is-real/fAegon, the fire-and-blood vengeance prophecy reading, R+L-adjacent Elia/Rhaegar. Node bodies live in the mint script. BUG-FIX (handled in finalize): retire `arianne CONSPIRES_WITH garin-the-great` (wrong target = legendary Rhoynar prince; replaced by E9 garin-of-the-orphans CONSPIRES_WITH arianne).

edges.quote: By law the Iron Throne should pass to her
edges.note: The Queenmaker plot's foundational legal premise: Myrcella's Dornish-primogeniture claim (she is older than Tommen). Tyene lays out the argument. FIRST CLAIMS-iron-throne edge in the graph; wires the whole Dorne arc to the throne it targets. Tier-2 — the claim is asserted under Dornish law but disputed by Westerosi custom (no ruling queen).

edges.quote: I want my rights
edges.note: Arianne's deep motive, stated to Doran: she is fighting for Dorne itself (her birthright), which she believes he is giving to Quentyn. The upstream driver of the plot, routed through the actor (the plot's cIn=0 is correct — causation routes through Arianne's grievance, not a false event-CAUSES-plot).

edges.quote: Her seduction of Ser Arys had required half a year
edges.note: MARQUEE (4-lens converge): Arianne used a half-year seduction to turn the Kingsguard Arys into the instrument of the plot. The LOVER_OF edge already exists; MANIPULATES via_seduction adds the using-him-as-a-tool layer (no SEDUCES type in vocab). The Soiled Knight chapter is entirely this mechanism.

edges.quote: she would give us leave to marry
edges.note: Distinct from the seduction (E3): Arianne fed Arys a known-false promise that once Myrcella was queen they would be given leave to marry — a princess who knows she cannot wed a Kingsguard. The false reward that secured his compliance.

edges.quote: I swore an oath
edges.note: Arys breaks his Kingsguard oath by joining a plot to crown Myrcella over the reigning king Tommen. The 'soiled knight' arc's core. Target = the current king (Tommen) whose throne he conspires against; Arianne's 'To Joffrey, not to Tommen' is her rhetorical dissolution of the obligation. (Verify the target choice.)

edges.quote: put his golden spurs into his horse and charged
edges.note: Arys's chosen-death suicide-charge at Hotah and the armed poleboat rather than yield — his agency in his own death (distinct from the existing areo KILLS arys). Models the soiled-knight's death-by-his-own-choice without a redundant event node.

edges.quote: of the orphans of the Greenblood
edges.note: Garin, one of the five conspirators, knelt to Myrcella as queen and arranged the Greenblood escape poleboat. (Quote anchors his identity at the crowning scene.)

edges.quote: His mother was my wet nurse
edges.note: Garin is Arianne's milk-brother and co-conspirator. REPLACES the wrong-target `arianne CONSPIRES_WITH garin-the-great` (retired in finalize).

edges.quote: His mother was my wet nurse
edges.note: Garin's mother nursed Arianne — the Rhoynar milk-kinship that grounds his lifelong loyalty.

edges.quote: of the orphans of the Greenblood
edges.note: Garin self-identifies as one of the orphans of the Greenblood (Rhoynar river people).

edges.quote: Drey went to one knee before her
edges.note: Ser Andrey Dalt (Drey), heir to Lemonwood, knelt to Myrcella as queen — active participant. andrey-dalt had core_in=0 (gap).

edges.quote: Arianne Martell arrived with Drey and Sylva
edges.note: Drey rode with Arianne to the Shandystone rendezvous as a co-conspirator.

edges.quote: Spotted Sylva knelt beside him
edges.note: Lady Sylva Santagar (Spotted Sylva), heir to Spottswood, knelt to Myrcella as queen — active participant.

edges.quote: Arianne Martell arrived with Drey and Sylva
edges.note: Sylva rode with Arianne to the rendezvous as a co-conspirator.

edges.quote: Her father has shipped her to Greenstone to wed Lord Estermont
edges.note: Doran's dispersal of the conspirators: Sylva married off to Greenstone (Lord Estermont). Doran is the disposing authority (her father executes it as part of Doran's conspirator-disposal). Verify the arranger-attribution.

edges.quote: sent to Norvos to serve your lady mother
edges.note: Drey's dispersal sentence: three years in Norvos serving Lady Mellario.

edges.quote: Garin will spend his next two years in Tyrosh
edges.note: Garin's dispersal sentence: two years in Tyrosh, with coin and hostages taken from his orphan kin.

edges.quote: Because I knew that you would spurn him
edges.note: WHODUNIT/the arc's structural irony: Doran confesses he paraded deliberately-repellent suitors before Arianne, knowing she'd refuse them, to conceal the secret betrothal pact — feeding her a false picture of his intent. His concealment is what drove her to the Queenmaker plot. via_false_information.

edges.quote: Nor will you get the war you want
edges.note: The saboteur-within: Darkstar scorned the plot's method from the start ('crowning the Lannister girl is a hollow gesture') and maimed Myrcella at the Greenblood to spark the war the plot was deliberately NOT triggering. He is AGENT_IN the plot but OPPOSES its goal. (The contested-intent of the maiming stays node-prose; gerold AGENT_IN myrcella-is-maimed exists.)

edges.quote: Darkstar did it
edges.note: The cover story told to Ser Balon Swann: that Darkstar (not Hotah) killed Arys Oakheart and maimed Myrcella. Re-frames Hotah's kill as Darkstar's deed — the official lie that buys Doran time.

edges.quote: It is all true
edges.note: Doran endorses the cover story to Balon Swann ('It is all true'), making himself complicit; Hotah's narration confirms it is a known lie ('Is it his gout that hurts him, or the lie?').

edges.quote: smashed her babe
edges.note: MARQUEE cross-arc seam (Sack-of-KL -> Dorne): Doran names Elia's murder as the blood debt at the root of his 17-year patience and the fire-and-blood pact. The graph had `murder-of-elia MOTIVATES oberyn` but NOT the Doran parallel — leaving his long-game without its stated root. (The vengeance-prophecy READING stays gated; this is the on-page MOTIVATES->character evidence.)

edges.quote: ash-and-iron wife
edges.note: Hotah bears the ash-and-iron longaxe he has carried ~30 years since his Norvoshi novitiate — his defining object. Lights a new 0-edge artifact.

edges.quote: stepped Areo Hotah, longaxe in hand
edges.note: The longaxe is the instrument of the ambush — Hotah springs it weapon-in-hand.

edges.quote: removed the head of Arys Oakheart
edges.note: Arys is beheaded by Hotah's longaxe — the poetic-detail victim->weapon edge (coexists with the existing areo KILLS arys).

edges.quote: left Sunspear for the peace and isolation of the Water Gardens
edges.note: Doran resides at the Water Gardens (his haven/refuge) for two years before the AFFC timeline. De-islands water-gardens (had 0 edges touching the Dorne core).

edges.quote: left Sunspear for the peace and isolation of the Water Gardens
edges.note: The Water Gardens lie within Dorne (three leagues of coast road from the Dornish capital Sunspear).

edges.quote: happily ensconced at the Water Gardens
edges.note: Ellaria and her young daughters are housed at the Water Gardens during the post-conspiracy arc.

edges.quote: crumbling old castle perched on a rock in the Sea of Dorne
edges.note: Ghaston Grey, the island prison Doran's captives feared, sits on a rock in the Sea of Dorne. De-islands ghaston-grey + sea-of-dorne.

edges.quote: crumbling old castle perched on a rock in the Sea of Dorne
edges.note: The Sea of Dorne is the Dornish coastal waters.

edges.quote: delivered her to the Spear Tower
edges.note: Arianne's captivity location — the eponymous 'Princess in the Tower.' Lights the new spear-tower node.

edges.quote: the slender Spear Tower
edges.note: The Spear Tower is one of the three towers of the Old Palace of Sunspear (with the Tower of the Sun and the Sandship).

edges.quote: confine them in the cells atop the Spear Tower
edges.note: Doran orders the three elder Sand Snakes confined in the cells atop the Spear Tower.

edges.quote: confine them in the cells atop the Spear Tower
edges.note: Same arrest order — Nymeria confined in the Spear Tower.

edges.quote: confine them in the cells atop the Spear Tower
edges.note: Same arrest order — Tyene confined in the Spear Tower.

edges.quote: fled back to High Hermitage
edges.note: Darkstar's escape after the maiming: Doran confirms 'Ser Gerold has fled back to High Hermitage, beyond our reach' (his seat — he already RULES high-hermitage).

edges.quote: lead him to High Hermitage to beard Darkstar in his den
edges.note: Doran dispatches Obara to lead Balon Swann to High Hermitage to hunt Darkstar — the Sand Snake forward-mission wiring.

edges.quote: That task will be yours, Nymeria
edges.note: Doran sends Nymeria to King's Landing to escort Myrcella back and take Dorne's small-council seat ('a voice in council, an ear at court') — wires Dorne forward into the KL arc.

edges.quote: I want you in King
edges.note: Doran sends Tyene to King's Landing 'on the other hill' to cultivate the new High Septon (the re-formed Faith Militant) — the other half of the Dorne->KL forward wiring.
